articles.title: India’s cement makers stare at bag shortage as West Asia war hits inputs
articles.excerpt: A polypropylene shortage triggered by West Asia supply shifts is squeezing cement bag makers, raising packaging costs and threatening dispatches just as fuel inflation hits margins.
articles.content:
As the war in West Asia ripples through petrochemical supply chains, polypropylene (PP), the key raw material used to manufacture cement packaging bags, is turning scarce.
The crunch is pushing up c…
